{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Internal Auditor - Operational and IT",
  "description": "Beta Glass, a proud member of the Frigoglass Group, stands as a strategic partner to international beverage bottlers. Positioned as a major supplier of glass packaging, we play a crucial role in the burgeoning markets of West and Central Africa.

Our diverse range of glass containers offers superior packaging solutions to clients across various sectors, including soft drinks, beer, spirits, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals. We are committed to delivering excellence in our products. At Beta Glass, we are not just suppliers; we are partners in progress, dedicated to setting new standards in the glass packaging industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Auditor - Operational and IT

Job Location: Lagos

Job Purpose


	To execute risk-based operational and IT-related audit assignments across the business, including procurement, supply chain, manufacturing controls, logistics, user access, IT general controls, and selected investigations.
	The role supports the Operational Audit stream and provides embedded IT audit capability within the Internal Audit Function.


Key Responsibilities


	Participate in planning and execution of operational, compliance, and IT-related audits in line with the approved audit plan.
	Evaluate the adequacy and effectiveness of operational controls across procurement, inventory, manufacturing, logistics, sales-support processes, and related business activities.
	Perform IT-related audit procedures covering user access, IT general controls, change management, backup processes, and basic cybersecurity/control hygiene reviews.
	Conduct walkthroughs, control testing, data interrogation, and exception analysis using ERP and process data where available.
	Support investigations, fraud-risk reviews, and special assignments involving system access, operational anomalies, or process irregularities.
	Track implementation of agreed actions and support continuous monitoring and targeted follow-up reviews.
	Maintain and develop capability in Information Technology General Control (ITGC), ERP/process data analysis, and operational risk assessment.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Accounting, Information Systems, Computer Science, Engineering, Finance, or a related field
	CIA/ CISA/ CRISC/ ACA/ ACCA or related professional qualification is required


The Person Must:


	Have IT Audit &amp; Systems Control Knowledge
	Have sound understanding of Operational Risk &amp; Control Awareness


Experience:


	Must have 4-6 years of relevant audit experience in internal audit, operational audit, IT audit, external audit, or internal control review
	CRMA/ CFE/ ISO 9001 Lead Auditor and/or ISO 45001 Lead Auditor is desirable
	ITGC testing, ERP controls review, user access review, data analysis, or cybersecurity/control assessment exposure
	Knowledge of Microsoft Dynamics Navision or any other Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) software
",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-07",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-09",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Beta Glass"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",

       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

    "value": "201514"
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

Internal Auditor - Operational and IT Job at Beta Glass




        
    

        
        Beta Glass, a proud member of the Frigoglass Group, stands as a strategic partner to international beverage bottlers. Positioned as a major supplier of glass packaging, we play a crucial role in the burgeoning markets of West and Central Africa.

Our diverse range of glass containers offers superior packaging solutions to clients across various sectors, including soft drinks, beer, spirits, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals. We are committed to delivering excellence in our products. At Beta Glass, we are not just suppliers; we are partners in progress, dedicated to setting new standards in the glass packaging industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Auditor - Operational and IT
     

            
    



Job Location: Lagos

Job Purpose


	To execute risk-based operational and IT-related audit assignments across the business, including procurement, supply chain, manufacturing controls, logistics, user access, IT general controls, and selected investigations.
	The role supports the Operational Audit stream and provides embedded IT audit capability within the Internal Audit Function.


Key Responsibilities


	Participate in planning and execution of operational, compliance, and IT-related audits in line with the approved audit plan.
	Evaluate the adequacy and effectiveness of operational controls across procurement, inventory, manufacturing, logistics, sales-support processes, and related business activities.
	Perform IT-related audit procedures covering user access, IT general controls, change management, backup processes, and basic cybersecurity/control hygiene reviews.
	Conduct walkthroughs, control testing, data interrogation, and exception analysis using ERP and process data where available.
	Support investigations, fraud-risk reviews, and special assignments involving system access, operational anomalies, or process irregularities.
	Track implementation of agreed actions and support continuous monitoring and targeted follow-up reviews.
	Maintain and develop capability in Information Technology General Control (ITGC), ERP/process data analysis, and operational risk assessment.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Accounting, Information Systems, Computer Science, Engineering, Finance, or a related field
	CIA/ CISA/ CRISC/ ACA/ ACCA or related professional qualification is required


The Person Must:


	Have IT Audit & Systems Control Knowledge
	Have sound understanding of Operational Risk & Control Awareness


Experience:


	Must have 4-6 years of relevant audit experience in internal audit, operational audit, IT audit, external audit, or internal control review
	CRMA/ CFE/ ISO 9001 Lead Auditor and/or ISO 45001 Lead Auditor is desirable
	ITGC testing, ERP controls review, user access review, data analysis, or cybersecurity/control assessment exposure
	Knowledge of Microsoft Dynamics Navision or any other Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) software
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administration Manager",
  "description": "Beta Glass, a proud member of the Frigoglass Group, stands as a strategic partner to international beverage bottlers. Positioned as a major supplier of glass packaging, we play a crucial role in the burgeoning markets of West and Central Africa.

Our diverse range of glass containers offers superior packaging solutions to clients across various sectors, including soft drinks, beer, spirits, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals. We are committed to delivering excellence in our products. At Beta Glass, we are not just suppliers; we are partners in progress, dedicated to setting new standards in the glass packaging industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administration Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Job Purpose


	Provide administrative services proactively to meet the company&rsquo;s requirements for a comfortable business environment.
	Strategically works with the Employee Relations Manager to meet all requirement for office suppliers, office maintenance services, guest house services, Expatriate management, office purchases and car fleet maintenance.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee and manage the day-to-day administrative operations of the company, including office management, facilities, inventory and administrative support services.
	Develop and implement administrative policies, procedures, and best practices to streamline workflows and improve efficiency.
	Supervise and lead administrative staff, including liaising with outsourced service providers on applicable employee issues.
	Provide administrative support to senior management/expatriates, including scheduling / planning applicable meetings, preparing reports, and managing correspondence.
	Coordinate travel arrangements, accommodations, and logistics for employees and executives as needed and also airport pickup/drop off and security escorts service.
	Manage budgets, expenses, and financial records for administrative operations, ensuring cost-effectiveness and accountability.
	Coordinate monthly knowledge sharing sessions and Beta Glass Women Network
	Arrange and excellently execute all logistics for smooth visits of foreign visitors including processing of visa, flight reservations/confirmations and local logistics to meet visitors&rsquo; need.
	Ensure guest house and expatriate houses are run smoothly and efficiently by monitoring steward performance, tracking of bookings and usages, furniture maintenance and other logistics needs.
	Provide car fleet services by ensuring effective repairs of cars, monitor pool car movement and monitor fuel consumption and drivers&rsquo; conduct.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Business Administration or any other related field
	Professional qualification is an added advantage.


Experience:


	Minimum of 7-10 years of relevant
	Knowledge of Microsoft Dynamics Navision or any other Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) software.


The Person Must Have:


	In depth knowledge of expatriate movement and logistic requirements
	In depth knowledge of protocol procedures in the international and local airports.&nbsp;
	Strong competencies in handling office administration.
	Demonstrate ability to be of high integrity and accountability.

Administration Manager Job at Beta Glass




        
    

        
        Beta Glass, a proud member of the Frigoglass Group, stands as a strategic partner to international beverage bottlers. Positioned as a major supplier of glass packaging, we play a crucial role in the burgeoning markets of West and Central Africa.

Our diverse range of glass containers offers superior packaging solutions to clients across various sectors, including soft drinks, beer, spirits, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals. We are committed to delivering excellence in our products. At Beta Glass, we are not just suppliers; we are partners in progress, dedicated to setting new standards in the glass packaging industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administration Manager
     

            
    



Job Location: Lagos

Job Purpose


	Provide administrative services proactively to meet the company’s requirements for a comfortable business environment.
	Strategically works with the Employee Relations Manager to meet all requirement for office suppliers, office maintenance services, guest house services, Expatriate management, office purchases and car fleet maintenance.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee and manage the day-to-day administrative operations of the company, including office management, facilities, inventory and administrative support services.
	Develop and implement administrative policies, procedures, and best practices to streamline workflows and improve efficiency.
	Supervise and lead administrative staff, including liaising with outsourced service providers on applicable employee issues.
	Provide administrative support to senior management/expatriates, including scheduling / planning applicable meetings, preparing reports, and managing correspondence.
	Coordinate travel arrangements, accommodations, and logistics for employees and executives as needed and also airport pickup/drop off and security escorts service.
	Manage budgets, expenses, and financial records for administrative operations, ensuring cost-effectiveness and accountability.
	Coordinate monthly knowledge sharing sessions and Beta Glass Women Network
	Arrange and excellently execute all logistics for smooth visits of foreign visitors including processing of visa, flight reservations/confirmations and local logistics to meet visitors’ need.
	Ensure guest house and expatriate houses are run smoothly and efficiently by monitoring steward performance, tracking of bookings and usages, furniture maintenance and other logistics needs.
	Provide car fleet services by ensuring effective repairs of cars, monitor pool car movement and monitor fuel consumption and drivers’ conduct.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree or Higher National Diploma (HND) in Business Administration or any other related field
	Professional qualification is an added advantage.


Experience:


	Minimum of 7-10 years of relevant
	Knowledge of Microsoft Dynamics Navision or any other Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) software.


The Person Must Have:


	In depth knowledge of expatriate movement and logistic requirements
	In depth knowledge of protocol procedures in the international and local airports. 
	Strong competencies in handling office administration.
	Demonstrate ability to be of high integrity and accountability.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

HR Supervisor Job at Huko Advisory Services




        
    

        
        At Huko Advisory Services, we help businesses unlock their full potential through smart, strategic, and innovative human capital solutions. Based in Lagos, Nigeria, we provide HR outsourcing, recruitment, training, consulting, and workforce development services to businesses across industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Supervisor

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos

Key Roles / Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Lead recruitment and selection processes
	Develop and implement HR policies.
	Oversee performance management and staff development.
	Ensure compliance with HR policies and regulations.
	Manage and supervise payroll administration.
	Coordinate employee training and development programs.
	Strong communication, coordination and maintain a positive organizational culture.


Qualifications and Experiences


	Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources Management, Business Administration or any related fields;
	Minimum of 5 to 7 years of relevant experience in HR Management including leadership or strategic HR responsibilities.
	Professional HR certifications such as CIPM, SHRM, CIPD, PHR or equivalent are highly preferred.
	Proficiency in MS O?ice Suite and Google Workspace.
	Ability to handle confidential information with professionalism and integrity.
	Strong knowledge of employment legislation and HR best practices.
	Excellent communication, interpersonal and problem-solving skills.
	Applicants must be residing around Lekki/Ajah axis.


Remuneration


	Salary: N250,000 Monthly
	Other Benefits: HMO and Leave Allowance.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Representative (Wine Company)",
  "description": "Prohuman Capital Consulting is a dynamic HR consulting firm dedicated to empowering organizations with comprehensive human resources expertise and strategic guidance. Founded on the principle that exceptional talent management drives business success, we partner with companies to navigate their most complex HR challenges and unlock their human capital potential. Our reach extends to companies in and around West Africa, where we do business with diverse organizations seeking strategic HR solutions. At Prohuman Capital Consulting, we believe that every organization is unique. Our consultative approach begins with understanding your specific business context, industry dynamics, and organizational culture. We then develop customized solutions that are practical, implementable, and measurable.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Sales Representative (Wine Company)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a results-driven and customer-focused Sales Representative to join our growing wine distribution company.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for promoting and selling the company&#39;s range of wines, building strong customer relationships, identifying new business opportunities, and achieving sales targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Promote and sell the company&#39;s wine products to retail stores, supermarkets, restaurants, hotels, bars, and other prospective customers.
	Identify and develop new business opportunities to expand the customer base.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with existing customers to encourage repeat business.
	Meet or exceed assigned sales targets and performance objectives.
	Conduct regular market visits to monitor competitor activities and identify market trends.
	Prepare and submit daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports.
	Ensure timely order processing, product delivery follow-up, and customer satisfaction.
	Represent the company professionally and maintain excellent product knowledge.


Requirements


	OND / HND / Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
	2 - 3 years of proven sales experience, preferably in the wine, beverage, FMCG, or retail industry.
	Strong negotiation, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to build lasting customer relationships and close sales.
	Self-motivated, target-driven, and able to&nbsp;&nbsp;work with minimal supervision.
	Valid driver&#39;s licence is an added advantage.


Benefits


	Competitive salary.
	Performance-based incentives.
	Career growth opportunities.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: prohumancapitalinfodesk@gmail.com using &quot;Sales Representative&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Sales Representative (Wine Company) Job at Prohuman Capital Consulting




        
    

        
        
     

            
    

Prohuman Capital Consulting is a dynamic HR consulting firm dedicated to empowering organizations with comprehensive human resources expertise and strategic guidance. Founded on the principle that exceptional talent management drives business success, we partner with companies to navigate their most complex HR challenges and unlock their human capital potential. Our reach extends to companies in and around West Africa, where we do business with diverse organizations seeking strategic HR solutions. At Prohuman Capital Consulting, we believe that every organization is unique. Our consultative approach begins with understanding your specific business context, industry dynamics, and organizational culture. We then develop customized solutions that are practical, implementable, and measurable.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Sales Representative (Wine Company)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a results-driven and customer-focused Sales Representative to join our growing wine distribution company.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for promoting and selling the company's range of wines, building strong customer relationships, identifying new business opportunities, and achieving sales targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Promote and sell the company's wine products to retail stores, supermarkets, restaurants, hotels, bars, and other prospective customers.
	Identify and develop new business opportunities to expand the customer base.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with existing customers to encourage repeat business.
	Meet or exceed assigned sales targets and performance objectives.
	Conduct regular market visits to monitor competitor activities and identify market trends.
	Prepare and submit daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports.
	Ensure timely order processing, product delivery follow-up, and customer satisfaction.
	Represent the company professionally and maintain excellent product knowledge.


Requirements


	OND / HND / Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
	2 - 3 years of proven sales experience, preferably in the wine, beverage, FMCG, or retail industry.
	Strong negotiation, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to build lasting customer relationships and close sales.
	Self-motivated, target-driven, and able to  work with minimal supervision.
	Valid driver's licence is an added advantage.


Benefits


	Competitive salary.
	Performance-based incentives.
	Career growth opportunities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Sales Representative" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Civil Site Engineer",
  "description": "Popville Luxury Homes is a fully integrated real estate development and management company headquartered in Abuja, delivering a new standard of intelligent luxury living. We create architecturally refined residences where advanced smart technology, timeless design, and uncompromising security converge. Inspired by the power, grace, and individuality of the world&rsquo;s most iconic horse breeds, our collections represent freedom, sophistication, and enduring value. Each Popville residence is thoughtfully engineered to enhance comfort, efficiency, and long-term investment performance. At Popville, we don&rsquo;t simply build homes&mdash;we develop future-ready assets designed for discerning homeowners and forward-thinking investors.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Site Engineer
Job Location: Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Site Engineer at Popville Luxury Homes Limited is responsible for overseeing the technical and on-site execution of construction projects, ensuring quality, safety, and timely delivery in line with the company&rsquo;s premium standards.

Civil Site Engineer Job at Popville Luxury Homes




        
    

        
        Popville Luxury Homes is a fully integrated real estate development and management company headquartered in Abuja, delivering a new standard of intelligent luxury living. We create architecturally refined residences where advanced smart technology, timeless design, and uncompromising security converge. Inspired by the power, grace, and individuality of the world’s most iconic horse breeds, our collections represent freedom, sophistication, and enduring value. Each Popville residence is thoughtfully engineered to enhance comfort, efficiency, and long-term investment performance. At Popville, we don’t simply build homes—we develop future-ready assets designed for discerning homeowners and forward-thinking investors.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Site Engineer
Job Location: Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Site Engineer at Popville Luxury Homes Limited is responsible for overseeing the technical and on-site execution of construction projects, ensuring quality, safety, and timely delivery in line with the company’s premium standards.
	This role goes beyond routine supervision, requiring strong problem-solving abilities, technical expertise, and coordination with various stakeholders to achieve project milestones.
	The Site Engineer works closely with the Project Director, subcontractors, and on-site teams to translate architectural and engineering designs into high-quality, luxury real estate developments.
	A keen eye for detail, adherence to safety and regulatory requirements, and the ability to drive operational efficiency are essential to ensuring that Popville’s projects reflect its commitment to excellence and client satisfaction.


Salary
N300,000 - N400,000 monthly.
